name: uroboros
description: Invoke with /uroboros:run. Zero-inference loop engineering for GitHub Spec Kit. One orchestrator drives the full SDD pipeline (specify → implement) end-to-end; an independent reviewer subagent interrogates every phase artifact and turns each inferred decision into an explicit question to the user; a dedicated implementer subagent writes the code on a model you choose at runtime. The loop that eats its own tail — and never guesses.
